content.json:
# 🎯 Threat Hunting Dashboard
---
Proactive hunting queries designed to surface low-and-slow attacks that evade alerting. Focuses on rare process executions, LOLBin abuse, first-time-seen network connections, suspicious logon patterns, and encoded command detection across the MDE telemetry.

content.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| summarize ExecutionCount = count(), DeviceCount = dcount(DeviceId), Devices = make_set(DeviceName, 3) by FileName
| where ExecutionCount < 5 and DeviceCount == 1
| where FileName !in~ ('conhost.exe', 'WerFault.exe', 'werfault.exe', 'svchost.exe', 'RuntimeBroker.exe', 'SearchIndexer.exe')
| sort by ExecutionCount asc
| take 20
content.title: Processes seen fewer than 5 times on only 1 device — rare execution candidates

content.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('winword.exe', 'excel.exe', 'powerpnt.exe', 'outlook.exe', 'onenote.exe', 'msaccess.exe', 'mspub.exe')
| where FileName !in~ ('splwow64.exe', 'dw20.exe', 'dwwin.exe', 'WerFault.exe')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, AccountName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Processes spawned by Office applications — macro/exploit indicator

content.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where FileName in~ ('certutil.exe', 'mshta.exe', 'regsvr32.exe', 'rundll32.exe', 'wmic.exe', 'bitsadmin.exe', 'cmstp.exe', 'msiexec.exe', 'odbcconf.exe', 'regasm.exe', 'regsvcs.exe', 'installutil.exe')
| extend SuspiciousArgs = iff(
    ProcessCommandLine has_any ('http', 'https', 'ftp', 'decode', 'urlcache', 'transfer', 'scrobj', 'javascript', 'vbscript', '-decode', '/decode'),
    true, false)
| summarize ExecCount = count() by FileName, SuspiciousArgs, DeviceName
| sort by SuspiciousArgs desc, ExecCount desc
content.title: LOLBin executions with suspicious arguments flagged

content.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where FileName in~ ('powershell.exe', 'pwsh.exe')
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ('-enc', '-encodedcommand', '-e ')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Encoded PowerShell executions

content.query:
let LookbackWindow = 30d;
let RecentWindow = 7d;
let HistoricIPs = DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(LookbackWindow) .. ago(RecentWindow))
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess' and RemoteIPType == 'Public'
| summarize by RemoteIP;
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(RecentWindow)
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess' and RemoteIPType == 'Public'
| where RemoteIP !in (HistoricIPs)
| summarize FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), DeviceCount = dcount(DeviceName), Devices = make_set(DeviceName, 3) by RemoteIP, RemotePort, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by FirstSeen desc
| take 20
content.title: New external IPs — seen in last 7 days but not in prior 30 days

content.query:
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess'
| where RemoteIPType == 'Public'
| where RemotePort in (4444, 4445, 1337, 8080, 8443, 9001, 9002, 31337, 1234, 6666, 6667, 6668, 6669)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, RemoteIP, RemotePort, RemoteUrl, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Connections to known C2 ports

content.query:
DeviceLogonEvents
| where ActionType == 'LogonSuccess'
| where LogonType == 'Network'
| where IsLocalAdmin == true
| summarize AdminLogonCount = count(), Devices = make_set(DeviceName, 5) by AccountName, AccountDomain
| where AdminLogonCount > 3
| sort by AdminLogonCount desc
content.title: Accounts with network admin logons on multiple devices — lateral movement with privilege

content.query:
DeviceLogonEvents
| where ActionType == 'LogonFailed'
| summarize FailCount = count(), TargetDevices = dcount(DeviceName) by AccountName, AccountDomain
| where FailCount > 20
| sort by FailCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Accounts with high logon failure count — credential spray or brute force

content.query:
DeviceLogonEvents
| where ActionType == 'LogonSuccess'
| where LogonType == 'Network'
| extend Hour = datetime_part('Hour', TimeGenerated)
| where Hour between (0 .. 5)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, AccountDomain, RemoteIP, LogonType
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Network logons between midnight and 5am — off-hours access

content.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where FileName in~ ('schtasks.exe', 'at.exe')
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ('/create', '/change', '-create')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Scheduled task creation

content.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where FileName in~ ('whoami.exe', 'net.exe', 'net1.exe', 'nltest.exe', 'ipconfig.exe', 'systeminfo.exe', 'quser.exe', 'tasklist.exe', 'nbtstat.exe', 'arp.exe', 'route.exe', 'netstat.exe')
| summarize ExecCount = count() by FileName, DeviceName, AccountName
| where ExecCount > 3
| sort by ExecCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Discovery command usage — recon tool execution
